title: [MTR4] BR Class 153 retexture by electro & soodari
description: This resourcepack adds BR Class 153 retextures for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![retex trains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0913e39efbd1df1377c3cab5b8b95cde3e459f16_0.webp)
_EMR livery by electrostarjudge_

## Overview

This Resourcepack is an extended Resourcepack that adds multiple retextures of BR Class 153 in the UK.

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (mtr4) and BR Class 153 Original RP [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/british-rail-class-153 ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/british-rail-class-153 )

## Disclaimer

This Resourcepack is not an official product of the UK TOC, including the FGW. Some livery did not apply to real Class 153 train.

## Contents

Class 153 retexture (Northern, London Midland, East Midlands Railway, First Great Western)
